text: Which of the following hazards is associated with fuel oil fires?

options.text: B) Reduced fire-fighting effectiveness due to low oxygen content
C) Emission of highly flammable vapors
D) Flashover of confined vapor clouds

explanation: Fuel oil fires in confined engine room spaces can lead to rapid heat accumulation and the build-up of flammable vapors. If these vapors reach their lower explosive limit, a 'flashover' or explosion can occur, posing a severe threat to the vessel.
